# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MyQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MyQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # 4 days in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 30 # in seconds

  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: MySNSTopic

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MyQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
              - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueAttributes'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueUrl'
            Resource: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref MySNSTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: The URL of the created SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref MyQueue

  TopicArn:
    Description: The ARN of the created SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref MySNSTopic
